name: HTS_WORKLOADS
description: Table to store the detailed value of the Workload demand, resulting from the various existing Workload plans.

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key identifiying the publish event record by a system generated ID

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: SCHED_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: SCHED_UNIT_ID

columns.Name: SCHED_SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: SKILL_ID

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the shift is Regular or On-Call or any custom shift type

columns.Name: REF_DATE
columns.Comments: Reference Date

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: START_TIME_OFFSET

columns.Name: END_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: END_TIME_OFFSET

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_VALUE
columns.Comments: WORKLOAD_VALUE

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_UOM
columns.Comments: WORKLOAD_UOM

columns.Name: BREAK_MINUTES
columns.Comments: Number of break minutes to deduct from the workload quantity

columns.Name: ORIGIN
columns.Comments: Process from which originates the workload value, among Budget, Staffing or Workload Plans

columns.Name: ORIGIN_WORKLOAD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Workload type of the workload item from which originates the workload value, among  Baseline, Adjusted or Actual

columns.Name: RESULT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the type of workload , among staffing workload, consolidated workload plans, or total consolidated workload

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Workload type of the result, among Baseline or Current

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
